div.p: Order online for pickup or dine-in

div.class: alert alert-warning text-center mb-0 rounded-0 fw-semibold

t.div: 🕐 You can still browse — checkout will open when we reopen.

div.class: alert alert-warning text-center mb-0 rounded-0 fw-semibold

t.div: 🕐 You can still browse — checkout will open when we reopen.

t.t: Reserve the Hall — Timur Indian Restaurant

section.class: o_colored_level o_cc o_cc2 pt80 pb80 text-center

div.p: Birthdays · Corporate Events · Seminars · Private Dining

textarea.name: details
textarea.placeholder: Dietary needs, AV equipment, seating arrangement…

form.p: We'll confirm your reservation within 24 hours.

div.p: Your reservation request has been received. We'll confirm within 24 hours.

t.p: Choose how you'd like your order, then proceed to payment.

div.class: alert alert-info mb-4 d-flex align-items-start gap-2
div.span: We're currently closed ( ). You can still place your order now — just pick a future time below and we'll have it ready for you!

div.class: card-header bg-white fw-bold border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between

div.div: How would you like your order? *

div.label: Delivery Address *
div.div: We currently deliver only within California, USA.

div.label: Pick a date *
Pick a time *
div.div: Available up to 1 week ahead · 30-minute slots during business hours
The tip will be included in your payment total.

textarea.name: special_request
textarea.placeholder: Add notes for your order (e.g., less salt, sugar-free, allergies)...

li.t-attf-class: rms-tracking-step#{' complete' if step['complete'] else ''}#{' active' if step['active'] else ''}

section.div: In the Share sheet, choose Add to Home Screen. If it is not listed, use Safari's Share button and choose Add to Home Screen there.

div.class: alert alert-success d-flex align-items-start gap-2 mb-4

span.t: We'll have it ready as soon as possible.

div.class: alert alert-warning d-flex align-items-start gap-2 mb-4

div.p: Your past orders with Timur Indian Restaurant.
You haven't placed any orders yet.

div.class: border rounded bg-white p-5 text-center shadow-sm
d-inline-flex align-items-center justify-content-center rounded bg-danger text-white fw-bold mb-3

div.p: Your account needs the Restaurant Stock Manager permission.
Toggle items on/off, fix prices, or add new dishes. Changes apply instantly.

table.class: table table-hover align-middle bg-white rounded shadow-sm overflow-hidden

textarea.placeholder: Short description shown on the menu

div.label: Item Name *
Description
Photo
div.div: Leave blank to keep the current photo.

div.p: Are you sure you want to delete ?
If this item has past orders attached to it, it will be archived (hidden from the menu) instead of fully removed, so old receipts stay accurate.

div.class: alert alert-warning text-center mb-0 rounded-0 fw-semibold

t.div: 🕐 You can still browse — checkout will open when we reopen.

template.name: RMS: Hide billing, fix Edit link
RMS: Hide address step and back button
RMS: Back to cart instead of back to address

p.t: Update your contact info for pickup.
Update your contact info and delivery address.

div.div: We currently deliver only within California, USA.
